fixes_applied.description: renderBandXAxis silently dropped middle x-labels via stride. Replaced with planBandXAxis: rotates 40/55/70/90 degrees, ellipsizes when band-height capped. All categories now labeled.
Grouped-bar value labels overlapped when bars too narrow. Auto-suppress all value labels when widest > barWidth * 1.05.
Pie with 2-4 slices and labelPlacement=inside showed only percentages, no slice names. Now show name + percent stacked when slice big enough.
Geo legend bar always anchored at frame.plot.x even when narrow map drew off-center. Now centered under actual map drawn area.
bar-split silently dropped categories via labelStride. Removed stride; uses planBandXAxis rotation + ellipsis like main axes.

Vertical bar with many narrow categories drew value labels on top of each other when showValueLabels=true. Tightened gate: showLabels = cfg.showValueLabels !== false && labelsFit (no longer override fit check on explicit true).

Stacked-area stepped interpolation produced disjoint rectangles with white intra-band gaps because top/bottom step semantics were inverted in the bottom traversal. Replaced with per-band rectangle emission (one M-L-L-L-Z per band) so every band is always a clean rectangle.

Pie/donut with explicit labelPlacement='inside' or 'outside' AND >4 slices rendered both inside-percent labels AND a sidebar legend. Refactored showLegend logic: explicit placement now suppresses the sidebar unless legendPosition is also explicit.
Donut outside-labels could extend past the canvas left/right edge for slices angled near horizontal. Added per-label width clamp + ellipsis based on the available margin gap on each side.

Combo chart's separateAxis threshold (0.2) was too strict, causing line series with values ~25% of bar magnitude to be plotted on the bar y-axis with no right-side ticks. Bumped to 0.5; also require both bars and lines to have data before kicking in.

Line chart with band-style x-axis (e.g., quarterly category labels) didn't pass xTickBandHeight to computeFrame, so rotated labels overflowed into the source footer. Now estimates the band height upfront and threads it to the frame.

Line chart with negative data point hid the bottom-most negative tick label via skipBottomLabel rule, so users saw data extending below '0' but no '-0.5' label to read the scale. Restricted skip rule to lowestValue >= 0 (positive-padding only).
Stacked-area with normalize:true used max=yMax*1.05=1.05 which niceScale rounded to 1.5, drawing a phantom 150% tick. Now passes max=yMax (=1) when normalize=true so the axis caps cleanly at 100%.

Donut with labelPlacement='none' rendered a bottom-of-plot legend that wrapped to multiple rows on poster preset; second row overlapped the source line. Added useTopLegend mode that allocates frame.legend at the top of the chart so the renderLegend wrapping consumes header space, not source space.

Pie auto-group >6 slices guard-rail (CLAUDE.md) was not enforced — MAX_SLICES=8 allowed 8 distinct wedges. Tightened MAX_SLICES=6, threshold check uses MAX_SLICES, ensuring any input with >6 slices folds the smallest into Other.

Donut sidebar legend silently dropped items when canvas height could not fit all rows at default 2× line-height. Now shrinks legend font down to a min of 12px (or 0.55× base) to fit all items, then uses a tighter 1.4× line-height.

GroupedBarConfig.orientation="horizontal" was silently ignored — always rendered vertical. Implemented full horizontal renderer (categories on Y axis, value scale on X) with niceScale ticks, ellipsized category labels, and value-label reserve mirroring the bar.ts horizontal pattern.

Grouped-bar rotated value labels could overprint bars when bars were narrower than label font. Added rotatedFits = barWidth >= valueLabelSize * 1.05 gate; rotation only kicks in when bar is at least font-tall.

Line inline series-name label could overflow when label width exceeded available margin on either side. Now suppresses the inline label entirely if it doesn’t fit on either side, and refuses meaningless single-character series names.

Vertical bar with showValueLabels=true silently suppressed all labels when bandWidth was narrower than label horizontal text width. Added rotated fallback: if bandWidth >= labelFontSize*1.05, draw 90° rotated labels above each bar tip.
